profile.name: Stephen James Jackson
profile.title: Web Developer
profile.summary: A hard working and self-motivated web developer with over four years of commercial experience building, maintaining, and deploying websites and applications. Passionate about learning new technologies and solving problems independently. Currently looking to transition into a larger company to further develop my skills and broaden my knowledge. Outside of work, I actively maintain a home lab environment running Docker, Jellyfin, Home Assistant, and self-hosted services accessible via Cloudflare tunnels — driven by a genuine interest in infrastructure, networking, and continuous self-improvement.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Set up, migrate, and monitor web hosting servers for multiple clients
Maintain and build new client websites, liaising directly with clients on requirements and providing training
Built a full Secret Santa application from scratch to replace the existing one
Developing a combined time-keeping and project overview application
Manage VPN, email, and network services across the business
Provide technical support for colleagues including VPN setup, Mac troubleshooting, and managing backups for the office QNAP server
Handle client support tickets end-to-end via email, phone, and video call

experience.title: Duty Manager & Stock Taker
bullets: Progressed from waiter to three successive promotions: Bar & Accommodations Manager, Duty Manager, and Stock Taker
Designed and implemented a revenue dashboard for the owner using the ePos system, providing at-a-glance visibility across multiple hotels
Took over stock-taking responsibilities for both establishments, reducing costs previously paid to external stock takers
Managed staff, accommodation bookings, and day-to-day hotel operations

experience.title: Full-stack Web Development
bullets: Completed a Full-stack Web Development diploma with Code Institute, graduating with Second Class Honours
Deepened knowledge of PHP, PHP OOP, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript during this period
